name: Mary (2019 Games)
description: A 20-minute AMRAP of handstand push-ups, alternating pistols, and pull-ups — the classic Girl WOD Mary, reused as a Games event.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2019/5 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; the classic Girl WOD Mary, reused as a Games event
